items.name: Drone
items.description: A high-fidelity, first-principles 6-DoF drone simulation built in C# and Godot 4. Modeled with explicit 4th-order Runge-Kutta tensor integration, dynamic center-of-mass shifts via the Parallel Axis Theorem, sub-step cable damping, fault-tolerant control allocation, and dynamic shader-driven environmental interactions.
